name: safe-text-post
description: File-based text posting with unicode lint and read-back verification — payloads always travel via files (never inline argv/heredocs), zero-width characters are rejected before posting, and every post is fetched back and byte-compared so curly quotes and non-ASCII content provably survived. Kills the empty-comment / corrupted-PR-body failure class.

interface.shortDescription: File-based text posting with unicode lint and read-back verification — payloads always travel via files (never inline argv/heredocs), zero-width characters are rejected before posting, and every post is fetched back and byte-compared so curly quotes and non-ASCII content provably survived. Kills the empty-comment / corrupted-PR-body failure class.
interface.longDescription: File-based text posting with unicode lint and read-back verification — payloads always travel via files (never inline argv/heredocs), zero-width characters are rejected before posting, and every post is fetched back and byte-compared so curly quotes and non-ASCII content provably survived. Kills the empty-comment / corrupted-PR-body failure class.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the safe-text-post plugin for this task.
